EmailTemplate.name: Ascension-EmailTemplate-Invision-AttestationAccessReview-Initial
EmailTemplate.Body:
#set($ctx = $spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.api.SailPointFactory").getMethod("getFactory", null).invoke(null,null).getCurrentContext()) #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "styleSheet" }) #set($styleSheet = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "headerTemplate" }) #set($headerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "footerTemplate" }) #set($footerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Server-Root-Path")) #set($ruleArgs = {}) #set($rootPath = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #set($currentYear = $spTools.formatDate($certification.getActivated(),"YYYY")) #set($dueDate = $spTools.formatDate($certification.getExpiration(),"MMM. dd "))

#if( $styleSheet ) $styleSheet #end #if( $headerTemplate ) $headerTemplate #end
#if ($workItem.getOwner().isWorkgroup()) Hello,

A new Access Review has been assigned to the $workItem.getOwner().getDisplayName() Workgroup and requires action.

This message has been sent to all members of this Workgroup. Any Workgroup member may take action.

#else Hello,

A new Access Review has been assigned to you and requires your action. Please review and approve or reject the associate’s elevated Invision access as soon as possible.

#end

FY$currentYear Invision Attestation

Click here to be directed to the Access Review. For full instructions on how to submit an Access Review as an Ascension associate, check here.

If you have any questions, please call the AIS Service Desk at 877-635-0535.

#if( $footerTemplate ) $footerTemplate #end
EmailTemplate.Description: Email Template for notifying work item owners of new certifications. Arguments --------- workItemName (String): The name of the Workitem workItem (Workitem): The Workitem object certification (Certification): The Certification Object requesterName (String): The display name of the Identity that requested the certification

Argument.name: workItemName
Argument.Description: The description property (also the name property) of the certification WorkItem.

Argument.name: workItem
Argument.Description: The WorkItem object for the certification.

Argument.name: requesterName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that requested the certification.

Argument.name: ownerName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that owns the certification.

EmailTemplate.Subject: -secure- Access Review Requires Action
